allow: Bash(python -c "import pdfplumber; pdf = pdfplumber.open\(''''MKS-SERVO42C-User-Manual-V1.1.2.pdf''''\); [print\(f''''--- Page {i+1} ---\\n'''', p.extract_text\(\)\) for i, p in enumerate\(pdf.pages\)]; pdf.close\(\)")

Bash(python -c "import PyPDF2; r=PyPDF2.PdfReader\(''''MKS-SERVO42C-User-Manual-V1.1.2.pdf''''\); [print\(f''''--- Page {i+1} ---\\n'''', r.pages[i].extract_text\(\)\) for i in range\(len\(r.pages\)\)]")
